svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="08JjYDz5CKLDBjrHz7FJ"> <mxGraphModel dx="2289" dy="1249" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-1" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Growth
<small>The objective</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="143" x="1198" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-2" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Organic growth
<small>Grow from within</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="169" x="419" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-3" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Inorganic growth
<small>Grow by combining</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="180" x="1180" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-4" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Non-core monetisation
<small>The brownie-point branch</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="223" x="1930" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-5" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Number of users
<small>Volume engine</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="177" x="185" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-6" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Profit per user
<small>Yield engine</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="163" x="720" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-7" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Mergers &amp; acquisitions
<small>Buy growth</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="221" x="920" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-8" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Joint ventures &amp; alliances
<small>Share the risk</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="246" x="1146.5" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-9" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Build E2E capability
<small>Integrate the chain</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="202" x="1450" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-10" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Lease / rent assets
<small>Idle → income</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="196" x="1695" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-11" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Advertising revenue
<small>Monetise attention</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="202" x="1941" y="422" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-12" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Value-added services
<small>Wrap the core</small>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="210" x="2193" y="306" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-13" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Grow market size" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="186" x="60" y="434" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-14" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Grow market share" vertex="1"> style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Revenue per user" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="184" x="542" y="434" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P9zhW55MgUFDIyjokj4e-16" parent="1"
